case_title: DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE VS. ALLEN S LUCAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED JAN-31-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, ALLEN S

DISMISSED. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT COULD NOT BE SHOWN. IN EFFECT, PLAINTIFF CAUSED ACCIDENT BY FAILURE TO YIELD RIGHT OF WAY TO CAR PARKING IN A LEGAL MANNER.
